blue_scrubs_headset.recommended_script_style: practice operations POV / remote medical assistant explainer
blue_scrubs_headset.video_editor_notes: Hero image for call handling, scheduling, follow-up. Use headset + laptop as visual anchor. Light Ken Burns on 9:16. Leave right side for text.
blue_scrubs_headset.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Medical admin wearing headset at laptop in bright office. Calm, professional. No patient data on screen.
compliance_risks: Do not imply speaker is a real doctor

teal_blouse_admin.recommended_script_style: front desk backup scenario / office workflow explainer
teal_blouse_admin.video_editor_notes: Strong for missed calls and scheduling angles. Voiceover over image with text reveals. 9:16 first.
teal_blouse_admin.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Professional admin at laptop with headset, multitasking office support. Clean healthcare office.
compliance_risks: No fake clinic owner POV unless approved

white_blouse_admin.video_editor_notes: Use centered crops only. Text-led native ad. Avoid edge crops in video.
white_blouse_admin.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Office admin at desk with laptop, professional support role. No medical claims.
do_not_use_for: talking-head first batch unless manually approved

navy_scrubs_admin.video_editor_notes: Floating icons may clash with motion text — simplify overlay in edit.
navy_scrubs_admin.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Healthcare admin in scrubs handling scheduling tasks at computer.

wide_office.recommended_script_style: voiceover / checklist reveal over desk scene
wide_office.video_editor_notes: Better as B-roll or background plate. Pan across desk/charts. Text-heavy overlay.
wide_office.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Medical office desk with charts and laptop — no identifiable patients.
compliance_risks: Charts may imply unverified cost claims

landing_headshot.recommended_script_style: trust / team-style / meet your remote support
landing_headshot.video_editor_notes: Secondary wave only. Simple quote card or team intro. Not first cold video batch.
landing_headshot.veo_prompt_notes: Do not generate talking-head from headshot without legal approval. Use as reference still only.

angleMap.Front Desk Backup: Give your front desk reliable backup
angleMap.Payroll Pressure: Add capacity without another in-office hire
